title: Musikabend - Musical Evening
description:
Musikabend - Musical Evening - Soirée musicale - Serata musicale

Evening concert at the International Schiller Institute conference in Rüsselsheim, Germany, July 2, 2011.

Liliana Gorini, President of Movimento Solidarietà (Italy)
Greeting, on Verdi tuning and bel canto singing

from 05:25
Johann Sebastian Bach, "Suite for Unaccompanied Cello" - BWV 1007

from 21:24
Kwame Cole (violin), Uschik Choi (piano)
Ludwig van Beethoven, "Spring sonata" - op. 24

from 47:52
Antonella Banaudi (soprano), Werner Hartmann (piano)
Robert Schumann, "Seit ich ihn gesehen" & "Er, der Herrlichste von allen" (from "Frauenliebe und Leben")
Giuseppe Verdi, "Morrò, ma prima in grazia" (from the opera "Un ballo in maschera")

from 61:36
Orchestra and chorus of the Schiller Institute and guests
Conductor: Sergej Strid
Giuseppe Verdi, "Va, pensiero" (from the opera "Nabucco")

from 68:35
Orchestra and chorus of the Schiller Institute and guests
Conductor: Sergej Strid
Piano: Benjamin Lylloff
Ludwig van Beethoven, "Choral Fantasy" op. 80
